assertionResults.title: Aggressive claims expose evidence hooks
assertionResults.reason: Re-run passed: the reviewed BETTER Docs evidence hook is obvious and clickable on the landing page, its href points to https://docs.tradebetter.app, and the destination resolves to a live BETTER docs page with claim-relevant status and product explanation rather than the dead docs.betteragent.ai hostname.

observations: The hero shows a visible BETTER Docs evidence hook immediately adjacent to the live/current-state claim, and the reviewed live-now section repeats the same BETTER Docs hook pattern on aggressive/current-state cards.

On the landing page, the extracted hook href was https://docs.tradebetter.app and a text check for docs.betteragent.ai on the reviewed page returned false, so no dead hostname copy appeared in the areas checked.
Clicking the hero BETTER Docs hook opened https://docs.tradebetter.app/ with page title 'Introduction - BETTER'.

The destination page is claim-relevant: it states 'Today the Terminal is live in closed beta for Polymarket copy trading; vaults and vBETTER are still in progress' and shows a dated status box covering live, in-progress, and planned states.
curl verification followed the destination to final_url=https://docs.tradebetter.app/ with http_code=200 and content_type=text/html; charset=utf-8.
evidence.consoleErrors: none on the local page or destination page; local console only showed React DevTools/HMR info logs
evidence.network: Hero evidence hook href -> https://docs.tradebetter.app ; curl reachability check -> GET https://docs.tradebetter.app/ returned 200

frictions.description: agent-browser's request log did not retain the cross-origin docs navigation details in this session.
frictions.resolution: Used curl with redirect-following to capture final URL, HTTP 200 status, and response headers for the docs destination.

summary: Re-ran VAL-NARR-008 after the BETTER Docs hostname fix. The assertion now passes: the visible BETTER Docs hook on the landing page points to docs.tradebetter.app, no dead docs.betteragent.ai hostname was visible in the reviewed landing content, and the destination resolved to a live BETTER docs page with claim-relevant status details.
